headline: Real-time voice AI tooling drives the day, with audio, collision detection, and file handling all breaking out together.
body: The TEN Framework anchors the window, pushing audio, audio processing, collision detection, VAD, STT, TTS, and interruption handling into breakout as an open-source stack for interruptible real-time voice agents [8]. A separate four-layer architecture splits brand voice into immutable identity, situational mode, example-anchored voice, and deterministic post-generation veto, lifting voice input and post-generation filtering as new entrants [3]. On the training side, Dwarkesh Patel maps the next paradigm beyond RLHF through verifiable rewards, test-time compute, and dreaming, while reinforcement learning and AI loops hold among the leading movers [7][6]. New entrants failure analysis and traffic estimation surface from a system design walkthrough, and Claude tooling continues to climb on a 17-plugin roundup [5][2].

cited_items.title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
Stop Writing Tone Instructions. Layer Them. - Isadora Martin-Dye, Isadora & Co
